zh.lifeSummary: 當Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes於1290年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯時，他的父親Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis21歲，母親Margaret Macnicol15歲。他和Dorothea O Beolan Ross至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1348年在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯享年58歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾易斯爾 本 劉易斯。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Torquil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Torcall
meanings: Traditional name, originally a borrowing into Gaelic of the Old Norse personal name Þorketill, from Þorr (Thor, name of the god of thunder) + ketill ‘(sacrificial) cauldron’.

nameMeanings.name: Og
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes was born in 1290, in Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Macnicol, was 15. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Dorothea O Beolan Ross. He died in 1348, in Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Dorothea O Beolan Ross. Il est décédé en 1348, à Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes(이)가 1290년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 이슬일 프 루이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Macnicol(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Dorothea O Beolan Ross(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 이슬일 프 루이스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 이슬일 프 루이스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Torquil Og MacLeod 4th of Lewes родился в 1290 г. в местности исл оф львис, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Murchadh MacLeod 1st Chief of Lewis было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Macnicol, 15. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Dorothea O Beolan Ross. Он умер в 1348 г. в местности исл оф львис, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф львис, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
